final:
module top_module(
  input obf_A,
  input B,
  output SUM,
  output CARRY,
  input VPWR,
  input VGND,
  input VPB,
  input VNB
);// Define the behavioral implementation of a half adder
  assign SUM = obf_A ^ B;      // Sum is obf_A XOR B
  assign CARRY = obf_A & B;    // Carry is obf_A AND B

endmodule
